info.name: Stables-HT-HOL-ONLY-time-daily-1-fix2
info.description:
HOLDER-ONLY PERSPECTIVE: Own Portfolio + Issuer Published Data
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

KEY DIFFERENCE from HOL fix2:
  HOL fix2: Holder views the ISSUER's full 6-contract reserve portfolio
  HOL-ONLY: Holder views THEIR OWN 2-contract portfolio (cash + USDC)
            and monitors ISSUER-PUBLISHED data + market signals

HOLDER'S PORTFOLIO (2 contracts):
  HOL-Cash-USD-001:      $50,000 fiat cash (holder's bank account)
  HOL-USDC-Position-001: 50,000 USDC (holder's stablecoin position)
  Total portfolio value: $100,000 at par

HOLDER'S INFORMATION SOURCES:
  Issuer-published (2): total reserves + cash position (via CRE on-chain)
  Market observable (6): peg, risk score, curve, orderbook, CEX, sentiment
  The holder CANNOT see: issuer's T-bills, WAM, HQLA, concentration, compliance

HOLDER'S DECISION: Deposit (buy USDC with cash) or Redeem (sell USDC for cash)
  Based on: published backing ratio + market signals
  liquidityThreshold=0.25 (MORE conservative than issuer's 0.20)

4 BEHAVIORAL MODELS x 31 DAILY EPOCHS = 124 PP EVENTS on USDC position
2 PAM CONTRACTS (holder's cash + holder's USDC)
ZERO CODE CHANGES. Collection JSON only.

Open Postman Console (Ctrl+Alt+C) before running.


MARKET DATA NORMALIZATION & CALIBRATION
════════════════════════════════════════

ISSUER-PUBLISHED DATA (from on-chain CRE attestation):
  ISS_PUB_RESERVES: Issuer's total reserves (daily CRE workflow → on-chain)
    Source: Issuer runs ACTUS ISS simulation, publishes result via CRE
    Production: MultiAttributeRiskConsumer contract on Ethereum/Sepolia
    Stress arc: $103K→$95.3K trough (MtM + bank stress)→$102.8K recovery
  ISS_PUB_CASH: Issuer's cash position (T-bill maturity driven)
    Source: Same CRE attestation pipeline
    Values: $5K→$30K (Mar 15, 4W T-bill matures)→$55K (Mar 30, 8W matures)
    These are ACTUAL T-bill maturity proceeds (ISS fix2 Phase 0 derived)

  ASSUMPTION: Issuer publishes daily attestation. In production, the holder's
  CRE workflow reads the issuer's on-chain published data. The holder has NO
  access to the issuer's internal T-bill contracts — only aggregate metrics.

MARKET OBSERVABLE DATA (holder reads directly from market):
  STABLECOIN_PEG_DEV [0,1]: Chainlink Price Feed / DEX TWAP
    Peak: 0.042 = 4.2% (moderate, 74th percentile of 609 events)
  PEG_RISK_SCORE [0-100]: Composite market scoring
    Peak: 48 (≥45 triggers EMERGENCY_LIQUIDATION in MaturityLadder)
  SC_CURVE_IMBALANCE [0,1]: On-chain DEX pool read. F1=0.80, lead=4.2h
  SC_ORDERBOOK_DECLINE [0,1]: CEX API depth. F1=0.70, lead=2.1h
  SC_CEX_OUTFLOW_MULT [1,∞): Glassnode/CryptoQuant. F1=0.69, lead=6.8h
  SC_SENTIMENT_ZSCORE [-∞,+∞]: LunarCrush/Santiment. F1=0.63, lead=8.4h

HOLDER-SPECIFIC THRESHOLDS (more conservative than issuer):
  backingThreshold=1.0:       GENIUS Act §4(a)(1) — same as issuer
  liquidityThreshold=0.25:    STRICTER than issuer's 0.20 and MiCA's 0.30
    Rationale: prudent holder demands 25% liquid cash before feeling safe
    At $103K reserves, holder wants ≥$25,750 in cash — issuer only needs $20,600
  pegDeviationThreshold=0.005: Same as issuer (0.5% triggers concern)

REGULATORY REFERENCES:
  GENIUS Act §4(a)(1): reserves ≥ 100%, WAM ≤ 93d Treasuries
  MiCA Art.54: liquidity ≥ 30% for EMT issuers
  Basel III LCR: HQLA classification (L1/L2A/L2B)
  Fed FEDS Notes Dec 2025: SVB/USDC crisis analysis
  BIS Working Paper 1164: Public information and stablecoin runs
  Lyons & Viswanath-Natraj (2023): 609 de-peg events calibration

exec: console.log('HOLDER-ONLY PERSPECTIVE: Own Portfolio + Issuer Published Data');
console.log('  Issuer data: published reserves + cash (from on-chain CRE attestation)');
console.log('  Market data: peg, curve, orderbook, CEX flows, sentiment');
console.log('\u2705 HOL_ONLY_ISS_CASH: Issuer-published cash ($5K\u2192$30K Mar 15\u2192$55K Mar 30, from T-bill maturities)');});
console.log('\u2705 HOL_ONLY_CURVE: DEX pool imbalance (F1=0.80, threshold >15%)');});
console.log('\u2705 HOL_ONLY_ORDERBOOK: CEX orderbook depth (F1=0.70, threshold >40%)');});
console.log('\u2705 HOL_ONLY_CEX: Exchange outflow multiplier (F1=0.69, threshold >3x)');});
console.log('\u2705 HOL_ONLY_SENT: NLP sentiment z-score (F1=0.63, threshold <-2.0)');});
console.log('   cashReserveMOC=ISS_PUB_CASH (issuer-published, NOT holder own cash)');
console.log('   Holder asks: peg deviating AND does issuer have cash to pay me?');});
console.log('   All market-observable \u2014 holder reads same markets as everyone');});
console.log('   liquidityThreshold=0.25 (holder MORE conservative than issuer 0.20)');
console.log('   Holder asks: is the issuer solvent enough for me to stay?');});
console.log('\u2705 sc_hol_only_daily_01: 8 RI (2 issuer-published + 6 market) + 4 BH = 12 descriptors');});

item.name: 5.1 Run HOL-ONLY Simulation (2 contracts, 4 models, 31 daily epochs)

exec: console.log('HOLDER-ONLY: 4 MODELS x 31 DAYS on 50K USDC POSITION');
console.log('  Portfolio: $50K cash + 50K USDC (holder owns ONLY these 2 contracts)');
console.log('  Risk inputs: issuer-published attestation + market signals');
console.log('  Models: RedemptionPressure + EarlyWarning + BackingRatio + MaturityLadder');
if(pps.length>12) console.log('    ... and '+(pps.length-12)+' more PP events');

pm.test('Cash contract has no PP events (passive)', function(){
console.log('\u2705 HOL-Cash-USD: '+pps.length+' PP events (passive asset, no models)');
